scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/server/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/client/tsconfig.json
scripts.setup: npm install && npx prisma generate --schema=packages/server/prisma/schema.prisma && npx prisma migrate dev --schema=packages/server/prisma/schema.prisma --name init && npm run db:seed -w packages/server
scripts.test: npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit -w packages/server && npm run test:unit -w packages/client && npm run test:unit -w packages/shared
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w packages/server && npm run test:coverage -w packages/client && npm run test:coverage -w packages/shared
